name: PublishKbArticle
description: Publish or update a knowledge base article in ServiceNow
author: sethbacon

inputs.name: serviceConnection
inputs.label: ServiceNow Service Connection
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional. A service connection for the ServiceNow instance. If not set, provide instance and credentials inline.

inputs.name: instance
inputs.label: ServiceNow Instance
inputs.helpMarkDown: ServiceNow instance name (e.g. 'mycompany'). Required when no service connection is provided.

inputs.name: authType
inputs.label: Authentication Type
inputs.helpMarkDown: Authentication method to use when no service connection is provided.

inputs.name: clientId
inputs.label: OAuth Client ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: OAuth client application ID.

inputs.name: clientSecret
inputs.label: OAuth Client Secret
inputs.helpMarkDown: OAuth client application secret.

inputs.name: username
inputs.label: Username
inputs.helpMarkDown: ServiceNow username for basic authentication.

inputs.name: password
inputs.label: Password
inputs.helpMarkDown: ServiceNow password for basic authentication.

inputs.name: kbId
inputs.label: Knowledge Base ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Knowledge base sys_id. Use 'list' to print available knowledge bases.

inputs.name: articleId
inputs.label: Article ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Existing article sys_id to update. If not provided, the task auto-detects via source key or JSON file.

inputs.name: title
inputs.label: Article Title
inputs.helpMarkDown: Article title (short_description). Required when creating a new article.

inputs.name: htmlFile
inputs.label: HTML File
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to an HTML file whose contents become the article body.

inputs.name: author
inputs.label: Author
inputs.helpMarkDown: ServiceNow username of the article author. Required when creating a new article.

inputs.name: category
inputs.label: Category
inputs.helpMarkDown: Category name. Prefix with 'sys_id:' to provide a raw sys_id. Auto-created if not found.

inputs.name: subcategory
inputs.label: Subcategory
inputs.helpMarkDown: Subcategory name (requires Category to be set). Auto-created under the parent category if not found.

inputs.name: workflowState
inputs.label: Workflow State
inputs.helpMarkDown: Target workflow state for the article.

inputs.name: sourceKey
inputs.label: Source Key
inputs.helpMarkDown: Stable correlation key for idempotent create/update (e.g. 'aws-connect-to-servers'). Stored as 'wiki-source: <key>' in meta_description.

inputs.name: readKeyFrom
inputs.label: Read Key From File
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to a Markdown file whose 'kb-key:' YAML front-matter field is used as the source key.

inputs.name: emitManifest
inputs.label: Emit Manifest Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to a JSON manifest file to append article metadata. When set, no KB*.json file is written.

inputs.name: force
inputs.label: Force
inputs.helpMarkDown: Continue processing (as a warning instead of a failure) when HTML validation flags likely content loss from a parsing/syntax issue. Security-relevant checks (script tags, inline event handlers, javascript:/vbscript:/data: URIs, <base>/meta-refresh redirects) are never affected by this input and always fail the task -- see SECURITY.md.

inputs.name: skipJsonLookup
inputs.label: Skip JSON Lookup
inputs.helpMarkDown: Skip looking for KB article JSON files in the current directory.

inputs.name: dryRun
inputs.label: Dry run
inputs.helpMarkDown: Preview the publish without writing to ServiceNow. Converts and validates content, performs read-only lookups (source key, existing article), and logs the planned create/update action and target — but performs no POST/PATCH, no category creation, and writes no manifest. Useful for PR builds.

inputs.name: uploadImages
inputs.label: Upload images as attachments
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, relative images in the article body are uploaded as ServiceNow attachments on the article, and their src is rewritten to a sys_attachment.do?sys_id=... URL. Re-publishing reuses unchanged images and replaces changed ones (matched by file name).

inputs.name: imageBaseDir
inputs.label: Image base directory
inputs.helpMarkDown: Directory that relative image paths in the HTML are resolved against (e.g. the module repo root). Defaults to the directory of the HTML file.

outputVariables.name: kbArticleId
outputVariables.description: The sys_id of the created or updated KB article.

outputVariables.name: kbArticleNumber
outputVariables.description: The article number (e.g. KB0001234) of the created or updated article.

outputVariables.name: kbWorkflowState
outputVariables.description: The workflow state of the article after this task runs.

messages.OAuthAccessTokenRequired: OAuth authentication requires an access token
messages.BasicAuthCredentialsRequired: Basic authentication requires username and password.
messages.HtmlContentLoss: HTML parsing resulted in significant content loss, possible syntax errors
messages.ExternalScriptNotAllowed: External script sources are not allowed in KB articles
messages.InlineScriptNotAllowed: Inline <script> elements are not allowed in KB articles
messages.BaseOrMetaRefreshNotAllowed: <base> elements and <meta http-equiv="refresh"> redirects to javascript:/vbscript: are not allowed in KB articles
messages.FormOrSvgAnimationNotAllowed: <iframe>/<object>/<embed>/<noscript>/<link>, <form>, SVG SMIL animation elements (animate/animateTransform/animateMotion/set), and MathML/foreign-content elements (math/annotation-xml/mglyph/malignmark/foreignObject) are not allowed in KB articles
messages.DangerousStyleContentNotAllowed: <style> content containing url(...), @import, expression(...), -moz-binding or behavior: is not allowed in KB articles (CSS-injection/exfiltration risk)
messages.DangerousStyleAttributeNotAllowed: An inline style attribute containing url(...), @import, expression(...), -moz-binding or behavior: is not allowed in KB articles (CSS-injection/exfiltration risk)
messages.EventHandlerNotAllowed: Inline event-handler attributes (on*) are not allowed in KB articles
messages.DangerousUriNotAllowed: javascript:, vbscript: and non-image data: URIs are not allowed in KB articles
messages.HtmlFileTooLarge: File '%s' is %s bytes, exceeding the %s-byte limit; refusing to read it into memory.
messages.KbListNotArray: Unexpected ServiceNow response: the knowledge-base list endpoint did not return an array in "result".
messages.ArticleNotObject: Unexpected ServiceNow response: no article object in "result" for article %s.
messages.AttachmentListNotArray: Unexpected ServiceNow response: the attachment list endpoint did not return an array in "result" for article %s.
messages.AttachmentUploadNoSysId: Unexpected ServiceNow response: the attachment upload for '%s' did not return a sys_id in "result".
messages.InvalidQueryValue: Invalid %s: values used in a ServiceNow query must not contain '^' or newline characters.
messages.SourceKeyCollision: Key collision: multiple articles found for source key '%s' (sys_ids: %s).
messages.ManifestCorruptBackedUp: Warning: kb-manifest '%s' exists but could not be parsed (%s); preserved the unreadable file as '%s' and starting a fresh manifest.
messages.ManifestCorruptNoBackup: Warning: kb-manifest '%s' exists but could not be parsed (%s) and could not be backed up; a fresh manifest will overwrite it.
messages.ManifestWriteFailed: Could not write manifest '%s': %s. A later run without a sourceKey may fail to resolve this article and create a duplicate.
messages.ArticleSysIdInvalidForEcho: Article sys_id '%s' does not match the expected ServiceNow format; echoing a placeholder in the ##[manifest] log line instead (the manifest file entry still uses the real value).
messages.ArticleInfoSaveFailed: Could not save article information to the KB JSON file: %s. A later run may fail to resolve this article and create a duplicate.
messages.MultipleKbJsonFilesFound: Warning: multiple KB article JSON files found (%s); using the most recently modified.
messages.ImageNotFound: Image not found, leaving src unchanged: '%s' (resolved to '%s')
messages.ImageTooLarge: Image '%s' is %s bytes, exceeding the %s-byte attachment size limit; refusing to read it into memory.
messages.ImagesUploadedBeforeAbort: %s image attachment(s) were already uploaded to ServiceNow before this run aborted: %s. They are attached but not yet linked from the article body; the next run will re-sync and link them automatically.
messages.CategoryNotObject: Unexpected ServiceNow response: no category object in "result" for category '%s'.
messages.ImageSrcOutsideBaseDir: Skipping image src '%s': resolves outside the image base directory ('%s' is not under '%s').
messages.ImageSrcMalformedEncoding: Skipping image src '%s': it contains a malformed percent-encoding that could not be decoded.
messages.AttachmentSysIdInvalid: Unexpected ServiceNow response: attachment sys_id '%s' is not a 32-character hex GUID; refusing to use it in a request URL or the article body.
messages.InstanceRequired: ServiceNow instance is required (set "instance" input or provide a service connection).
messages.InvalidInstance: Invalid ServiceNow instance '%s'. Expected the instance name only (letters, digits, hyphens), e.g. 'mycompany' for mycompany.service-now.com.
messages.OAuthClientCredentialsRequired: OAuth authentication requires clientId and clientSecret.
messages.LookingForKbJson: No article-id resolved yet. Looking for KB article JSON file...
messages.UsingArticleIdFromJson: Using article ID from JSON file: %s
messages.KbIdRequiredForCreate: Knowledge base ID (kbId) is required for creating an article.
messages.TitleRequiredForCreate: Article title is required for creating an article.
messages.ContentRequiredForCreate: Article content is required (set htmlFile input).
messages.AuthorRequiredForCreate: Author is required for creating an article.
messages.DryRunMissingFields: Dry run: create would fail — missing required field(s): %s.
messages.DryRunComplete: Dry run complete — no changes made.
messages.ImagesRewritten: Rewrote %s image reference(s) to ServiceNow attachments.
messages.ImagesMissingSummary: %s image(s) not found and left unchanged.
